title: Google Dorking Challenge
description: Use Google search operators to locate specific files.
problemStatement:
# Objective
Become proficient with Google Dorking syntax to uncover exposed information on `tesla.com`.

## Challenge Tasks
Perform the following searches and document the number of results or a sample URL for each. (Note: Results change over time).

1.  Find all **PDF documents** on `tesla.com` that contain the word `"quarterly"`.
2.  Find pages on `tesla.com` that have `"index of /"` in the title (directory listings).
3.  Find Excel files (`.xls` or `.xlsx`) on `tesla.com`.

## Deliverable
Write down the exact Google query strings you used.
hints: Use `intitle:` for searching the HTML title.
expectedOutput:
1. `site:tesla.com filetype:pdf quarterly`
2. `site:tesla.com intitle:"index of /"`
3. `site:tesla.com filetype:xls OR filetype:xlsx`
solutionCode:
# Query 1
site:tesla.com filetype:pdf quarterly

# Query 2
site:tesla.com intitle:"index of /"

# Query 3
site:tesla.com (filetype:xls OR filetype:xlsx)
